cases.prompt: 앱 다국어 지원 붙여줘. i18n 세팅하고 RTL(아랍어 미러링)도 같이.

assertions.text: Produces a framework i18n setup using next-intl v4 / react-i18next / expo-localization with real code
Uses ICU message format for plurals, gender, and select
Implements RTL via CSS logical properties plus dir attribute and a mirroring checklist for Arabic/Hebrew

cases.prompt: Set up internationalization with locale routing and a translation workflow for my app.

assertions.text: Sets up locale-aware Intl.* formatting for date, number, and currency
Defines a translation-file structure with key naming rules and a per-locale QA checklist (DE/FI overflow, CJK line-break, pseudo-localization)
